data.raceComments: {"comment":"A very even field of BM74 performers will race over 1400m for 130K, and the consistent mare 3. XARPO is on top for us after her game run for third in a tougher grade here last week. The 7-day backup is a query, but with the aid of a 2kg claim, she is nicely placed at this level to take it out. 13. GOLD COAST BELLE cruised home when scoring 17 days ago at Sandown-Lakeside, and even though she has come a long way in a short time, she will drop 3.5kg for this. She copes with any track conditions, and she has the scope to measure up in this. Each way. 2. BUTTERNUT PRINCESS was G3 placed here in February, and her next 2 starts were solid enough in tougher fields. A 3kg claim will offset her weight rise, and she can bounce straight back into form in this.  1. TERRESTAR will strip fitter second up, and in this grade, with a 2kg claim, she will be right in the thick of things this time. Each way.","runners":[3,13,2,1],"exclusive":true}
